segment.source: Renders a vertical timeline as an ordered list of events, each with a prominent year marker, a title, and an optional rich-text description. Use it for: chronological company narratives — founding stories, 'our history' sections, year-by-year accounts, anniversary retrospectives found on about pages or in brochures. Prefer 'Company Milestones' for dated achievements as a numbered grid, 'Timeline' for generic process steps, and 'Changelog Data View' for product release histories.
